how_it_works.description: The site will appear in search and help customers find what they need in your pharmacy.

faq.question: Can I create a website for a pharmacy chain with multiple addresses?
faq.answer: Yes, add all locations with addresses, operating hours, and contacts in the pharmacy block.

faq.question: How do I display the medication catalog?
faq.answer: In the editor, add a catalog block — enter medication names, prices, and categories.

faq.question: Can I accept online orders through the site?
faq.answer: Product reservation with self-pickup is available. Delivery on paid plans with integration.

faq.question: How do I publish weekly promotions?
faq.answer: The promotions section updates in the editor — change content anytime without a developer's help.

faq.question: How much does a pharmacy website cost?
faq.answer: Basic website is free. Catalog with large number of items and integrations on paid plans.

faq.question: How will customers find my pharmacy through search?
faq.answer: Site optimized for local search: pharmacy name + district/city are indexed by search engines.
